name: Communications
tagline: Telling the Emerging 100 story — amplifying our mission, brand, and impact.
overview: The Communications committee shapes and amplifies the voice of Emerging 100 Atlanta across Instagram, Threads, and LinkedIn. Comms writes every caption, manages every post, and tells the story of E100's impact. The voice is always purposeful, human, and rooted in community. Every post answers one question: why does this moment matter?
